title: polypodium irioides f. cristatum
intro: Polypodium irioides f. cristatum, also known as the Creeping Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Polypodium irioides f. cristatum include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Polypodium irioides f. cristatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as poultices and salves, to treat wounds and skin conditions.
